commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=25cefc315975d1eaa8fde3ae051b7ce7392ba4ac)
commands.review_summary:
The branch changes the OpenAI completions reasoning replay sanitizer to delete empty `reasoning` and `reasoning_content` strings and adds a unit test for OpenRouter assistant replay.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main builds params, then the OpenRouter DeepSeek V4 wrapper re-adds `reasoning_content: ""` through `streamWithPayloadPatch`, and the existing OpenRouter test expects that field on an assistant `tool_calls` message. I did not perform a live OpenRouter request.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor or maintainer handling because the code misses the later wrapper mutation and the external PR lacks after-fix real behavior proof; automation should not repair this without contributor proof.
commands.reason: comment version already processed in ledger
